scripts.format: prettier --write --ignore-unknown --log-level=warn . && uv run ruff format . && autocorrect --fix .
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:js && pnpm run lint:py && pnpm run lint:text
scripts.lint:py: uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.lint:fix: eslint . --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern --fix && pnpm -r run lint:fix && uv run ruff check --fix . && pnpm run format
